导师一对一单带回本计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-231213223_58644525<br>vk.com/topic-235289110_59477568<br>vk.com/topic-231207871_60007932<br>vk.com/topic-231552754_58378330<br>vk.com/topic-231207865_58250736<br>vk.com/topic-231213223_58644571<br>vk.com/topic-231239255_58250745<br>vk.com/topic-237892917_59812372<br>vk.com/topic-238137160_59477624<br>vk.com/topic-231210225_58250772<br>vk.com/topic-231239255_58250778<br>vk.com/topic-231239816_58690046<br>vk.com/topic-238147970_59477658<br>vk.com/topic-238147971_60008036<br>vk.com/topic-231552753_58644648<br>vk.com/topic-237892917_59812447<br>vk.com/topic-237849531_60008061<br>vk.com/topic-238147971_60008084<br>vk.com/topic-231210225_58250839<br>vk.com/topic-237892917_59812495<br>vk.com/topic-235289918_58864390<br>vk.com/topic-238147970_59477733<br>vk.com/topic-231213223_58644720<br>vk.com/topic-231552754_58378489<br>vk.com/topic-231210237_59812532<br>vk.com/topic-238137160_59477765<br>vk.com/topic-231213223_58644766<br>vk.com/topic-231239255_58250900<br>vk.com/topic-231552754_58378523<br>vk.com/topic-237849531_60008211<br>vk.com/topic-231207865_58250930<br>vk.com/topic-231552753_58644829<br>vk.com/topic-231207871_60008247<br>vk.com/t
